title: PVP Clumps
description: An experience stacking plugin designed for PVP and SMP servers. Lightweight and optimized whilst working straight out of the box.
body:
## What is this?
Designed to solve the problems of finding a viable Clumps plugin for PVP.
### Problems?
- "SMP core" is paid, and comes with a bunch of heavyweight random features some people may not want and at the time of writing this It doesn't work for me which is mostly why I made this.
- "Clumps" plugin isn't up to standard with most pvp servers and requires configuration to get working that some people may not know or maybe don't understand how to do it.

## Features
- Works out of the box with no setup required.
- Groups according to popular practice servers.
- Solves the lag caused by large volumes of experience orbs.
- Extremely lightweight.

## Compatability
**Minecraft:** 1.21+
**Java:** 21+

## Installation
Download the latest version then drag and drop the jar into your plugins folder.
Then restart.
